array.string: cd /Users/vardaankoenig/Documents/Paperclip/koenig-ai-org/services/notifier && if [ ! -d .venv ]; then /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements.txt; fi && set -a; . /Users/vardaankoenig/Documents/Paperclip/koenig-ai-org/.env.koenig 2>/dev/null; set +a; export NOTIFIER_STATE_DIR=/Users/vardaankoenig/Documents/Paperclip/koenig-ai-org/services/notifier/.state; mkdir -p "$NOTIFIER_STATE_DIR"; .venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8300
